reviews.comment:
Hace tiempo no venía, un desastre, baños cerrados, nada, pero nada para comer en el servicompras y pésima la atención del mismo... deberían controlar más a los maleducados de los empleados... en fin solo una estación, de servicio no tiene nada

(Translated by Google)
I hadn't been here in a while, it's a disaster. The bathrooms are closed, there's absolutely nothing to eat at the convenience store, and the service there is terrible... they should really control the rude employees... in short, it's just a station, it's not a service station at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkX1AycE53EAE

reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible y cuando mi hijo quiso pasar al baño, le dijeron que no estaban disponibles, que los tienen cerrados con llave porque se "roban" las cosas, sinceramente me pareció horrible negar el ingreso.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with fuel and when my son wanted to go to the bathroom, they told him they weren't available, that they keep them locked because things are "stolen" from them. Honestly, I thought it was horrible to deny entry.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNkMEl2SDRBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésimo, nunca ví gente con tan pocas ganas de laburar, tiene 4 surtidores y trabajan con dos (los cuatro funcionan bien), perdimos hora y media para cargar combustible por ineficiencia de esta gente, un delirio. Ni amables ni cordiales ni nada, unos paspados bárbaros.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible. I've never seen people so unmotivated. They have four pumps and only operate two (all four are working fine). We wasted an hour and a half getting fuel because of their inefficiency. It was absurd. They weren't friendly, courteous, or anything, just incredibly rude.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR0ek82akZREAE
